`♡ You Know where to Find me // And I know where to look ♡`

INSPO: TVGIRL

___________________________________________

♂️POV -

Lance and you used to be in a relationship, you're his ex boyfriend, and he is yours. You two used to live in a small apartment together, and on the night of your leaving, forgot many things. Lance still had your old books, lighter, favorite movie CDs. You had his jewelry, Marvel comics, and more. Lance came over to take his shit back about 5 months after the break up, and is ready to deal with your bullshit..

"I-i-i-I'm not a- not a crook!"
creator: ZzsleepyxzZ
